message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Review needed for consensus">
Luca, we're at 6/8 reviewer approvals. Could you please review Lea's changes and send your approval or feedback? Files changed: `e2e/user-journey.spec.ts`, `static/css/main.css` (line 193), and `package.json`.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I've already reviewed all three files and sent my approval twice. Let me confirm once more explicitly.

input.content:
Luca Palmieri -- EXPLICIT CONSENSUS: APPROVED.

I have already reviewed all three changed files in detail:
- e2e/user-journey.spec.ts (read the full file, reviewed all test changes)
- static/css/main.css line 193 (--color-primary oklch lightness change)
- package.json (@axe-core/playwright dependency)
- package-lock.json (verified dependency resolution)

I sent detailed review feedback to Lea and approval to you in two prior messages. My consensus has not changed. All changes are sound. Please count me as approved (6/8 should become 7/8 with my vote).
input.summary: EXPLICIT APPROVAL -- count Luca as approved

routing.summary: EXPLICIT APPROVAL -- count Luca as approved
